ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the incident took place */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the incident location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the incident */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Number of injuries reported in the incident */,
  "operations" TEXT /* Any operational notes or additional information regarding the response */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reported the incident */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city belongs to */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "incident_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualties" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with this casualty record */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities recorded */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries recorded */,
  "casualty_description" TEXT /* Description of the casualties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with this response */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the response */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Details of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_responses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with this update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with this file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_files_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
